{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Abidan Collapse
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Abidan Collapse]] is an event that occurred in the [[Pioneer world]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
